$description: Component tokens for the Avatar Group component, which displays multiple avatars in a horizontal layout with two variants: stacked (overlapping) or non-stacked (with gaps). Includes an optional 'Add More' CTA button. Figma Reference: Node ID 26683-72318

$component.name: Avatar Group
$component.description: A composite component that displays multiple user avatars in a horizontal layout. Commonly used to show team members, collaborators, or participants in a compact space.
$component.structure: Horizontal layout with avatars, either overlapping (stacked) or separated with gaps (non-stacked), with optional '+' button at the end

sizes.xs: 24px avatars - Small size for dense layouts
sizes.sm: 32px avatars - Compact size for lists and cards
sizes.md: 40px avatars - Standard size for most use cases

variants.stacked: Avatars overlap each other with negative margins, creating a compact visual stack
variants.non-stacked: Avatars are separated with gaps between them for better individual visibility

usage.contexts: Project collaborators, team members, document viewers, meeting participants, shared access lists
usage.maxVisible: Typically shows multiple avatars (up to 10 in the component)
usage.addMoreButton: Optional CTA button with '+' icon to indicate additional members or add new members

container.$comment: Main wrapper container - horizontal flex layout for the avatar group

direction.description: Avatar group uses horizontal layout with left-to-right arrangement

align-items.description: Vertical alignment of avatars and CTA button

spacing.$comment: Spacing configurations for both stacked and non-stacked variants

stacked.$comment: For stacked variant: negative margin on avatars creates overlap, padding-right on container compensates

xs.description: Padding-right on avatars container for xs: 4px

sm.description: Padding-right on avatars container for sm: 8px

md.description: Padding-right on avatars container for md: 12px

non-stacked.$comment: For non-stacked variant: positive gap between avatars

avatar.$comment: Individual avatar styling within the group

color.description: Border color for all avatars: white (#FFFFFF)

radius.description: Border radius for all avatars: full circle (200px)

z-index.$comment: Stacking order - first avatar has highest z-index, decreasing for each subsequent avatar

decrement.description: Amount to decrease z-index for each subsequent avatar (10, 9, 8, 7...)

cta.$comment: Add More button (CTA) - optional button with '+' icon at the end of avatar group

3xs.description: CTA button size for 3xs group: 10px (matches avatar size)

2xs.description: CTA button size for 2xs group: 16px (matches avatar size)

xs.description: CTA button size for xs group: 24px (matches avatar size)

sm.description: CTA button size for sm group: 32px (matches avatar size)

md.description: CTA button size for md group: 40px (matches avatar size)

background.description: Background color of CTA button: white (#FFFFFF)

radius.description: Border radius for CTA button: full circle

icon.description: Icon displayed in CTA button: plus/add icon

container.description: ARIA role for avatar group container

cta.description: ARIA role for Add More CTA button

container.description: Format for ARIA label describing the group

cta.description: ARIA label for Add More CTA button
